name: Dheeraj Jha
bio: Founder of CppIndia and passionate C++ developer. Dheeraj started the community to create a welcoming space for C++ developers across India.

name: Ankur M Satle
bio: Founder member and frequent speaker at CppIndia tech talks. Ankur brings deep expertise in modern C++ techniques and design patterns.

name: Mahendra Garodi
bio: Founder member with a passion for performance engineering, SIMD, and modern C++ features. A regular contributor to CppIndia's tech talks.

name: Kashish Nagpal
bio: Community moderator and speaker who helped shape CppIndia's inclusive culture. Known for talks on C++20 Concepts and developer tooling.

name: Hemil Ruparel
bio: Community moderator and enthusiastic speaker. Hemil's talks on testing, compiler internals, and programming language design are fan favourites.
